substep.title: Update Design Children
substep.action: Edit {{design_path}} frontmatter children: add the structure canonical alias.

substep.title: Stamp
substep.action: uv run {base_dir}/scripts/stamp-frontmatter.py --file "{{structure_path}}" --note "S-phase locked; {{plan_count}} plan(s), {{slice_count}} slice(s), {{file_count}} file(s)"

substep.title: Emit Handoff
